title: Huawei IdeaHub S3 75"
description: The HUAWEI IdeaHub S3 series features an intelligent dual camera that delivers a realistic image, a premium meeting experience, and lag-free collaboration. Thanks to enhanced HD audio , video , and AI features, it captures every detail and intelligently adapts to user needs. This solution is designed for modern offices and meeting rooms, helping companies build a smart working environment while increasing work efficiency and collaboration quality Redirect your video call from a phone or computer to the IdeaHub screen. This allows you to take advantage of all the benefits offered by the IdeaHub system during video conferences â integrated cameras, microphones, and speakers The native Huawei Cloud Meeting app allows you to join a video conference from anywhere using a computer, mobile phone, or other device in 1080p HD. In OPS mode (an additional Windows-based PC module), you can also install third-party video conferencing applications to meet the diverse needs of all users The IdeaHub screen can be mirrored to a phone or tablet, allowing you to use your device as a controller. Screen mirroring is supported for up to 40 devices with individual control, ensuring user privacy and data security The IdeaHub S3 75 automatically activates note-taking mode as soon as you start writing on the screen with the pen. You can then insert notes into documents, images, and web pages HarmonyOS operating system 8-core processor, 8 GB RAM, 128 GB flash Wi-Fi 6, 2.4 GHz + 5 GHz Bluetooth and NFC (1) 10/100/1000 Mbps port (1) USB-C, (1) USB-C (fast charging supported), (3) USB 3.0, (1) HD-AI…
